companyNameJapanese: 東京エレクトロン株式会社
description: Global supplier of semiconductor and flat panel display production equipment. Key products include coater/developers, etch systems, CVD equipment, and cleaning systems. One of the world's largest semiconductor equipment manufacturers.

_externalRelationships.notes: Works with 400+ suppliers. Key clients are world's top foundries and IDMs.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, TradingEconomics, Company IR, Nikkei
_metadata.notes: FY2026 forecast: Net sales 2.6T JPY (+6.9% YoY). EBITDA: 679B JPY, margin 31.24%. Dividend yield: 1.27%. China sales ~30% in 2025.
